design_philosophy.core_concept: High-Visibility Terminal for the Modern Age
principles: Data Density over White Space (Use the Bento Grid Mode B)
High Contrast for readbility in dark mode
Sharp Edges (No rounded corners larger than 2px)
Motion should feel 'glitchy' or 'mechanical', not fluid/organic

usage_rules.gradients: Avoid smooth gradients. Use sharp linear gradients or solid blocks.
usage_rules.text_contrast: Ensure primary text is #EDEDED or #FFFFFF. Use Green/Cyan for data values only.
usage_rules.states: Hover states should invert colors (Black text on Green bg) or add a glowing border.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Add a fixed pointer-events-none z-50 overlay with repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0) 50%, rgba(0,255,65,0.02) 50%), background-size: 100% 4px.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders everywhere. No shadows for depth—use borders for definition.
visual_enhancers.grid_background: Use a subtle SVG grid pattern on the main background (opacity 0.05).

Card.enhancement: Add a 'corner bracket' effect using pseudo-elements or SVGs for that technical feel.

Button.styles: rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-mono font-bold hover:bg-primary hover:text-black transition-colors duration-0

Input.styles: rounded-none bg-background border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 font-mono

Badge.styles: rounded-none border-primary/50 text-primary bg-primary/10 uppercase text-[10px]

Charts.customization: Hide grid lines or make them very subtle. Use Neon Green (#00FF41) and Cyan (#00F3FF) for lines. Darken the tooltip background.

Sidebar.styles: Fixed left sidebar with icon-only mode on tablet, full on desktop. Border-right.

layout_grids.rules: Containers must fill height (h-full). Use aspect-ratio for charts.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Set the 'dark' class on the HTML element by default or force it in tailwind config.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Keep it sharp.
Ensure the floating AI Chatbot is positioned 'fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50' and has a 'minimize' state so it doesn't block data.
For the 'Market Mood' dashboard, use a heatmap visualization (red/green blocks).
For 'Live News', use a scrolling ticker or a dense list with 'Typewriter' effect on new items.

do_not: Use gradients for backgrounds (use solid colors or subtle patterns)
must: Ensure high contrast ratio (4.5:1) for text
Use 'Space Mono' for all numeric data and headers
